Yoakum County

Introduction to Yoakum County

Arrows in Yoakum County

Arrow #15: Denver City

More Details for Arrow #15

Coordinates: 32.9653461, -102.8307954

Installed: December 14, 2011

Marker Text:

Comanches & Kiowas hunted bison on Mckenzie Draw and camped at water sites in aeolian sands by Denver City

Get Directions via Google Maps

No image available for this arrow.

Arrow #39: Plains

More Details for Arrow #39

Coordinates: 33.1888725, -102.8289679

Installed: August 2, 2012

Marker Text:

Comanches hunting bison followed Sulphur Springs Draw and camped by the springs near Plains

Get Directions via Google Maps

No image available for this arrow.

Map of Arrows in Yoakum County

Explore the map below for arrow locations and the county boundary.

Welcome to the Quanah Parker Trail!

Explore the historical arrow markers commemorating Quanah Parker and the Comanche people across the Texas Plains Trail Region. Use the map on the homepage or navigate via the menu to learn more about this effort.
